observations.agent 8 text: 📈 Agent 8: Behaviour & Risk Drift Agent Rule-based drift detection with hybrid scoring. Compares transaction volume, geographic activity, counterparty concentration, product usage against onboarding baseline; scores velocity anomalies and peer deviation. Degraded mode when no transaction data available. Coming Soon Enterprise Not active in pilot Enterprise roadmap 11 checks These agents are not active in the pilot environment. They are part of RegMind’s enterprise automation roadmap. observations.agent 10 text: 📋 Agent 10: Ongoing Compliance Review Agent Consolidation agent with AI narrative. Verifies document currency, screening recency, policy applicability, condition compliance, filing deadlines; consolidates inter-agent findings; AI generates compliance narrative and escalation/closure recommendation. Degraded mode when upstream agents have not run. Coming Soon Enterprise Not active in pilot Enterprise roadmap 11 checks These agents are not active in the pilot environment. They are part of RegMind’s enterprise automation roadmap.
